title: Assertion fault on SQL input
bug_features_seed: CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE t1(id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE t2(mx_payload INTEGER CHECK(mx_payload >= 0));
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION trig1_func() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ BEGIN INSERT INTO t2(mx_payload) VALUES (NEW.id);
key_bug_features: IF NOT EXISTS trigger with multiple RETURNING clauses
